teaching.concept: A blockquote sets a quote or callout apart from the rest of a document.
teaching.howTo: Start the line with a greater-than sign, a space, then the words.

candidates.title: Blockquote
candidates.prompt: Write the callout as a blockquote in Markdown.

matchChecks.feedback: Add a blockquote with words inside it.

editorialChecks.review: Keep this short callout in one blockquote.

hints: The callout starts at the beginning of the line.
Type a greater-than sign, one space, then the words.
Example: `> The window is open.`
